raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "to Jojakims tas Kehniſsch no
Judã ar Ugguni bij tadedſi-
najs/ un pee teem patcheem tap-
pe wehl dauds tahdi Wahrdi
peelikti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXXVII. Nodalla.
Zedekijus gribb/ ka Jeremijum preekſch winna/
un preekſch teem Laudim to KUNGU buhs
geeluugt : 1/ z. Kam tas Praweets peejaſ-
ka/ ka tee Kaldeëri/ kas kahdu Brihdi no ta
Pilsfahta irraigabhjuschi/ attak atnahks: 8.
Un to Pilsfahtu tadedſinahs: 10. Us ko
tas Praweets/ kad winch no ta Pilsfahta
gribb iſceet/ tohp ſaguhſtikts: 11/ 15. Un
preekſch ta Kehnixa ſlahdinahſs: 17. Un
ifdenas ar Maiſes Reezeni ehdihaſs: 21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas Kehniſsch Zede-
kijus/ Josijus Dehls
waldia Zekantius Wee-
tã/ ta Dehla Jojakima/ ko Ne-
bukadNezars tas Kehniſsch no
Babeles par Kehniku bij eezeb-
lis eekſch tahs Semmes Judã.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Bet nedg wiſch / nedg
winna Kalpt/ nedg tee Laudis
tahg Semmes klausija teem
Wahrdeem ta KUNGÃ/ ko
Wiſch bij runnajs zaar Jere-
miju to Praweetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Tomehr fuhttija tas Keh-
niſsch Zedekijus Zukalu Setemi-
jus Dehlu/ un Sewantiju Mase-
jus Dehlu to Preestert pee Jere-
miju to Praweetu/ un likke faz-
zibt: Luhds jelle preekſch nuums
to KUNGU tawu Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Jo Jeremijus gabje wehl
eeſcha un ahra ſarp teen Lau-
dim/ un tas wehl ne bija Zeetu-
mã liſts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un Warauſs Karra-Spehks
bij zehlees no Egiptes. Sem-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nies/ un tee Kaldeëri/ kas ap Je-
rusalernes bij apmettuſchees/ to
Slawu no teem dsirdejscht/ bis
no Jerusalernes atsabhjutchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Tad notikte ta KUNGA
Wahrds uhs to Praweetu Jere-
miju/ uu fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Ta ſakta tas KUNGS/
tas Iſraëta Deews: Ta buhs
jums fazzibt us to Kehniſſu no
Judã/ kas juhs pee mannim irr
fuhtiſg manni watahaft : Raugi/
Warauſs Karra-Spehks / kas
jums par Paligu irr iſgahjis/
greecifees atpakak ue tawu
Semmi/ us Egipti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Un tee Kaldeëri nahks at-
pakak / un katrohs prett ſcho
Pilsfahtu/ un uhſhems to / un
fadedſinahs to ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Ta ſakta tas KUNGS:
Ne peewilteet juhsas Dwehſeles/
ta juhs ſakat: Tee Kaldeëri tee-
ſham no mumã aisees nohſt/
jo tee ne aisees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Jo jeſchun juhs ſankat
wiſſu to Kaldeëro Spehku/ kas
prett jums katro / un atliftu
(tikkai) no teem kahdi eewainott
Wihri / tad zeltees tee ikkatrs
fawa Telti/ un fadedſinahs ſcho
Pilsfahtu ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Wehl tas notikte/ kad to
Kaldeëru Spehks no Jerusalernes
mes bij aigabhjis/ Warauſs Kar-
ra-Spehka deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tad iſqahje Jeremijus no
Jerusalernes/ ka winch us Ben-
jamina Semmi ſtaigatu/ un at-
ſchit-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
